title: More Nemo's Woodcutter Variants
description: Nemo's Woodcutter for every kind of wood
body:
![Title of "More Nemo's Woodcutter Variants" and gif-Animation of all the different variants below](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Nemos-Woodcutter-Variants/pres/mr_desc_banner.gif)
# **More**　_Nemo's Woodcutter_　**Variants**
**Have you ever wished there were more variants of the Woodcutter from the hit mod _"_[_Nemo's Woodcutter_](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-woodcutter)_"_?**  
> Well, wait no longer, because here they are: All wood types (not just Oak like the original) now have their own woodcutter!

### Note:
- This add-on requires its base ([Nemo's Woodcutter](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-woodcutter)) to be installed alongside it. It cannot run on its own.
- Recipe overwriting does not work properly from within separate mods, as such you might need to use the recipe book or JEI/REI/EMI to be able to craft the variants instead of the original.

---
